id.description: Unique event identifier (UUID v4), generated when the event is emitted

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was created

parentId.description: ID of the chronologically preceding event in the session, forming a linked chain. Null for the first event.

ephemeral.description: When true, the event is transient and not persisted to the session event log on disk

version.description: Schema version number for the session event format

producer.description: Identifier of the software producing the events (e.g., "copilot-agent")

copilotVersion.description: Version string of the Copilot application

startTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session was created

selectedModel.description: Model selected at session creation time, if any

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort level used for model calls, if applicable (e.g. "low", "medium", "high", "xhigh")

gitRoot.description: Root directory of the git repository, resolved via git rev-parse

repository.description: Repository identifier derived from the git remote URL ("owner/name" for GitHub, "org/project/repo" for Azure DevOps)

hostType.description: Hosting platform type of the repository (github or ado)

headCommit.description: Head commit of current git branch at session start time

baseCommit.description: Base commit of current git branch at session start time

context.description: Working directory and git context at session start

alreadyInUse.description: Whether the session was already in use by another client at start time

parentId.description: ID of the chronologically preceding event in the session, forming a linked chain. Null for the first event.

ephemeral.description: When true, the event is transient and not persisted to the session event log on disk

toolCallId.description: Tool call ID of the parent tool invocation that spawned this sub-agent

agentDisplayName.description: Human-readable display name of the sub-agent

data.description: Sub-agent completion details for successful execution

content.description: The system or developer prompt text

role.description: Message role: "system" for system prompts, "developer" for developer-injected instructions

name.description: Optional name identifier for the message source

promptVersion.description: Version identifier of the prompt template used

variables.description: Template variables used when constructing the prompt

metadata.description: Metadata about the prompt template and its construction

content.description: The notification text, typically wrapped in <system_notification> XML tags

agentId.description: Unique identifier of the background agent

agentType.description: Type of the agent (e.g., explore, task, general-purpose)

status.description: Whether the agent completed successfully or failed

description.description: Human-readable description of the agent task

prompt.description: The full prompt given to the background agent

shellId.description: Unique identifier of the shell session

exitCode.description: Exit code of the shell command, if available

shellId.description: Unique identifier of the detached shell session

kind.description: Structured metadata identifying what triggered this notification

parentId.description: ID of the chronologically preceding event in the session, forming a linked chain. Null for the first event.

requestId.description: Unique identifier for this permission request; used to respond via session.respondToPermission()

toolCallId.description: Tool call ID that triggered this permission request

fullCommandText.description: The complete shell command text to be executed

intention.description: Human-readable description of what the command intends to do

readOnly.description: Whether this command is read-only (no side effects)

commands.description: Parsed command identifiers found in the command text

possiblePaths.description: File paths that may be read or written by the command

url.description: URL that may be accessed by the command

possibleUrls.description: URLs that may be accessed by the command

hasWriteFileRedirection.description: Whether the command includes a file write redirection (e.g., > or >>)

canOfferSessionApproval.description: Whether the UI can offer session-wide approval for this command pattern

warning.description: Optional warning message about risks of running this command

toolCallId.description: Tool call ID that triggered this permission request

intention.description: Human-readable description of the intended file change

fileName.description: Path of the file being written to

diff.description: Unified diff showing the proposed changes

newFileContents.description: Complete new file contents for newly created files

toolCallId.description: Tool call ID that triggered this permission request

intention.description: Human-readable description of why the file is being read

path.description: Path of the file or directory being read

anyOf.description: File or directory read permission request

toolCallId.description: Tool call ID that triggered this permission request

serverName.description: Name of the MCP server providing the tool

toolName.description: Internal name of the MCP tool

toolTitle.description: Human-readable title of the MCP tool

args.description: Arguments to pass to the MCP tool

readOnly.description: Whether this MCP tool is read-only (no side effects)

toolCallId.description: Tool call ID that triggered this permission request

intention.description: Human-readable description of why the URL is being accessed

toolCallId.description: Tool call ID that triggered this permission request

subject.description: Topic or subject of the memory being stored

fact.description: The fact or convention being stored

citations.description: Source references for the stored fact

toolDescription.description: Description of what the custom tool does

args.description: Arguments to pass to the custom tool

toolArgs.description: Arguments of the tool call being gated
